english: 0,"alliance one international, inc"

chichewa: 1, inapangidwa kuti iwone zokhoma za bizinesi za zaka za mu 21st century ndipo ndife odzipereka kukumana ndi zobetchera mopambana ku mbali zonse
english: 1, was created to meet the challenges of a 21st century business environment and we are committed to meeting those challenges successfully on all fronts

chichewa: 2," choyambirira cha zimenezo, ndikudzipereka kwathu popanga bizinesi mwa chilungamo chathunthu"
english: 2, foremost among them is our commitment to conduct our business with complete integrity

chichewa: 3,"kudziwika kwathu kwapadziko lonse chifukwa cha chikhalidwe chathu chabwino ndi kudalilika pochita bizinesi, kumene kwapangidwa ndi anthu ambiri kwa zaka zambiri, kudzayesedwa ndi kuonedwa mu bizinesi iliyonse imene tikupanga"
english: 3,"our worldwide reputation for honest and reliable business conduct, built by so many people over so many years, will be tested and proven in each business transaction we make"

chichewa: 4," tili pa dziko lonse lapansi, mwamphamvu ndiponso timalondola zimene kasitomala wafuna koposa kale"
english: 4," we are more global, dynamic and customer-driven than ever before"

chichewa: 5, koma chikhumbokhumbo chopambana ndi kukwaniritsa kasitomala chimayamba ndikutsirizika ndi kudzipereka kwathu potsatila malamulo ndi kuchita mwachilungamo ndipo ngati kampani imene ikupezeka pa dziko lonse lapansi tikuyenera kupanga ndikutsatira malamulo amene akonzedwa a padziko lonse
english: 5, but our quest for competitive excellence and customer satisfaction begins and ends with our commitment to lawful and ethical conduct and as a global company we must create and follow a set of global rules

chichewa: 6,m’ndandanda wa malamulo athu wochitira bizinesi ndi umene ukutitsogoza ku mchitidwe wotsatira malamulo moyenera
english: 6,our code of business conduct is our guide to ethical and lawful conduct

chichewa: 7, ukufotokoza bwino za zimene kampani yikuyembekeza kumbali ya chikhalidwe mokhudzana ndi malamulo ndizoyenera kutsatiridwa ndi wolembedwa ntchito aliyense – chipangano choyenera kutsatilidwa pamene wina walembedwa ntchito
english: 7," it clearly defines the company’s expectations for legal and ethical behavior on the part of every employee – an obligation that is, in fact, a condition of employment"

chichewa: 8," ma dayilekitala a aoi, ma ofisala, antchito ndi wothandizira akuyenera kupanga bizinesi mogwirizana ndi zoyenera kutsatiridwa, chilungamo kumbali ya chuma ndi ndalama"
english: 8," aoi directors, officers, employees and agents are expected to conduct the company’s business according to the highest standards of professional ethics, financial integrity and legality"

chichewa: 9,"tonse timakhala ndi zinthu zimene zimafuna nthawi yathu, koma uthenga umene uli mu m’ndandanda wa malamulo (cbc) udzagwira ntchito ngati mwatenga nthawi ndikuyesetsa kuwuwerenga ndikuchita mobvomerezana ndi ndondomekoyi pochita bizinesi"
english: 9,"all of us have many demands on our time, but the information contained in the cbc will only be effective if you take the time and make the effort to read the materials and apply these standards of conduct in your business activities"

chichewa: 10," ngati mbali ya malamulowa siyikumveka kapena muli ndi mafunso pa zimene mukukumana nazo, mukambirane za madandaulo anuwo ndi bwana wanu, woyimilira depatimenti ya oyang’anira ogwira ntchito, ofisala wa corporate compliance kapena dayilekita wa corporate compliance"
english: 10," if any aspect of the cbc is unclear to you or if you have questions about a situation you are facing, your concerns can be discussed directly with your supervisor, human resource representative or the corporate compliance director"

chichewa: 11, mungathenso kuyimba foni pa nambala yowona za compliance ya alliance one kuchokera kwina kuli konse kumene muli pa dziko lonse lapansi kudzera ku nambala ya ulere kapena pa webu sayiti
english: 11, you may also access alliance one’s compliance helpline from each of our locations worldwide through either the toll-free telephone number or the website

chichewa: 12,kukolana kwa zofuna za munthu ndi kampani kumachitika pamene zofuna zamunthu zikuwoneka kuti zikukhulana ndi zochita za kampani
english: 12,a conflict of interest occurs when an individual’s private interest interferes– or has the appearance of interfering – with the interests of the company as a whole

chichewa: 13," kukolanaku kungathe kukula ngati dayilekitala, ofisala, wogwira ntchito kapena wothandizira apanga zinthu zimene zingapangitse kugwira ntchito kwake bwino bwino kuti kusokonezeke"
english: 13," a conflict situation can arise if a director, officer, employee, or agent takes actions or has interests that may make it difficult to perform his or her job objectively and effectively"

chichewa: 14," mkangano ungakhalepo ngati dayilekitala, ofisala, wogwira ntchito kapena wothandizira kapena a pa banja lake alandila ma benefiti molingana ndi ntchito yake ku kampani"
english: 14," conflicts of interest also arise if a director, officer, employee, agent or a member of his or her family, receives improper personal benefits as a result of his or her position with the company"

chichewa: 15," kugulitsa masheya, kuphumitsa kampani mwayi wa bizinesi, kupanga bizinesi ndi zina mwa zinthu zomwe zingapangitse kuti pakhale kukolana pakati pazofuna zanu ndi zakampani"
english: 15," securities trading, corporate opportunities and outside employment, business interests & investments are examples of specific issue-areas where you may encounter conflicts of interest"

chichewa: 16,zinthu zomwe zingapangitse kuti pakhale kukolana zikuyenera kunenedwa polemba kalata kwa ccdcco kapena clo komanso mapepala ake onse akuyenera kuperekedwa molingana ndi malamulo
english: 16,"potential conflicts of interest and related party transactions must be disclosed in writing to the ccd or clo, and properly documented per company policy"

chichewa: 17, kukhala ndi zinthu zopangitsa kuti pakhale kukolana sikuswa malamulo athu akagwiridwe ka ntchito koma kulephera kunena ku kampani za zinthuzo
english: 17," having a conflict of interest is not necessarily a violation of our code of business conduct, but failing to disclose it is"
18,potential or actual

chichewa: 19," zolengeza chiongola dzanja kapena zongoyerekeza, kusintha, zimene zinalengezedwa kale kapena zongoyerekeza;"
english: 19," earnings announcements or estimates, or changes to previously released announcements or estimates;"
20, financial results;

chichewa: 21, zolembedwa ndi zowonjezeredwa ku ngongole zamgonagona;
english: 21, write-downs and additions to reserves for bad debts;

chichewa: 22, kukuza kapena kuchepetsa magwiridwe a ntchito;
english: 22, expansion or downsizing of operations;

chichewa: 23," katundu wa tsopano, zopangidwa ndi zozindikiridwa mwatsopano;"
english: 23," new products, inventions or discoveries;"

chichewa: 24, milandu yayikulu kapena zochita za boma
english: 24, major litigation or government actions;

chichewa: 25," kuphatikizana zogulidwa, zonenera malonda, kugwirira ntchito limodzi ndi makampani ena kapena zosintha ku katundu wa kampani;"
english: 25," mergers, acquisitions, tender offers, joint ventures or changes in assets;"

chichewa: 26," zosintha pa zimene akatswri ayamikira kapena mlingo wa ngongole; zichitochito zokhudza ma sheya a kampani (monga kulephera kwa kubwezera ma sheya, kuitanira ma sheya ogulitsidwa kuti kampani iwagulenso, mapulani ogulanso katundu wogawidwa, kusintha kwa cholowa, kusintha kwa umwini wa ma sheya;"
english: 26, changes in analyst recommendations or debt ratings;

chichewa: 27, kusintha kwa oyendetsa kampani ndi njira zatsopano
english: 27, events regarding the company’s securities
28, changes in control of the company or extraordinary management developments;
29, extraordinary borrowing;
30, liquidity problems; and

chichewa: 31, zosintha za ma auditor kapena chidziwitso cha kampani chochokera kwa auditor kuti kampani siyingadalirenso lipoti ya auditor
english: 31, changes in auditors or auditor notification that the company may no longer rely on an audit report
32,"bribery is illegal, whether the bribe is offered to a government official (public sector bribery), or a private company or citizen (private sector bribery)"
33, it harms the communities where we operate

chichewa: 34, tikuyenera kutenga nawo mbali pa njira zothandiza kuthetsa ziphuphu
english: 34, we must actively support efforts to stop bribery

chichewa: 35,aliyense wa ife ayenera kutsatira malamulo onse odana ndi ziphuphu
english: 35,each of us must strictly comply with all domestic and extraterritorial anti-bribery laws

chichewa: 36, awa ndi malamulo a dziko limodzi amene amaletsa katangale mu mayiko ena
english: 36, extraterritorial anti-bribery laws are the laws of one country that prohibit bribery in other countries

chichewa: 37,"ngakhale ziphuphu ndi kuswa malamulo ndikulakwira malamulo a kampani, chiphuphu chitaperekedwa kwa wogwira ntchito m’boma kapena munthu wamba, kasitomala kapena sapulaya, wogwira ntchito ku alliance one akuyenera kudziwa zimenezi"
english: 37,"although bribery is illegal and against company policy regardless of whether the bribe is offered to a government official or a private citizen, customer or supplier, unique concerns exist in each instance that alliance one employees need to be aware of"

chichewa: 38,"ndalama zofanana ndi ndalama, kapena ma benefiti (ma travelling cheque ndi ma benefiti);"
english: 38,"cash, cash equivalents, or other benefits (travelers checks, travel benefits);"
39, personal services;
40, employment or the offer of employment;
41, charitable contributions for the benefit of the official;
42, political contributions; and

chichewa: 43," kugwiritsa ntchito katundu wa kampani (kuphatikizapo ndege, nyumba, magalimoto, maboti, ndi zina zotere"
english: 43," use of the company’s facilities (including but not limited to aircraft, houses, vehicles, boats, etc"

chichewa: 44,) ndi wogwira ntchito m’boma kapena a ntchito awo kuti atukule ndi kuwonetsa katundu wa kampani ndi ntchito zake
english: 44,") by government officials or their staff other than for purposes of promoting, demonstrating or explaining the company’s products or services"

chichewa: 45,kuba ndalama kumachitika pamene munthu atenga zimene wazipeza atalakwa kuti ziwoneke ngati sizinapezeke munjira yolakwika
english: 45,money laundering occurs when persons try to make the proceeds of crime appear legitimate by filtering them through non-criminal ventures

chichewa: 46, malamulo a mu mayiko ambiri amaletsa dala kugwiritsa ntchito zinthu zimene zapezeka munjira yolakwika
english: 46, laws in many countries prohibit acceptance or use of the proceeds of criminal activities

chichewa: 47, mukuyenera kutsatira malamulo onse amene akukamba za kuba ndalama ndi malamulo amene akufuna kuti inu munene pamene mwaona ndalama ndi zinthu zina zolakwika
english: 47, you must comply with all applicable money laundering laws and laws that require reporting of cash and other suspicious transactions

chichewa: 48," mukuyenera kupeza zokwanira pa makasitomala, ma sapulaya ndi ena amene mukuchita nawo bizinesi kuti mudziwe kumene ndalama zawo zikuchokera kumabizinesi ovomerezeka"
english: 48," you must use due diligence to obtain enough information about customers, suppliers, and others with whom you have business relationships to be satisfied that their money comes from legitimate business activities"

chichewa: 49, mukuyenera kutsatira malamulo onse okhudzana ndi ndalama
english: 49, you must comply with all rules concerning acceptable forms of payment

chichewa: 50, ndi zosavomerezeka ndi malamulo a kampani kulandira ndalama ndi ma invoice
english: 50, it is against company policy to accept cash payment of any invoice

chichewa: 51," ndipo ndi zosavomerezeka ndi lamulo la kampani, pokha pokha ngati pali china chake ndiponso ndi ulangizi wa zamalamulo wa kampani, kulandira ndalama monga ngati ma money order kapena ma travelling cheque kapena kulandira ndalama kwa amene simukumudziwa"
english: 51," it is also against company policy, except under extraordinary circumstances with the approval of the ccd, to accept payments in cash equivalents such as money orders or travelers checks, or to accept checks from unknown third parties"

chichewa: 52, ngati ndalama zoterozo ndizovuta kuzipewa mulandire chilolezo kuchokera kwa ofisala wa ku kampani ndikutsatila zonse zimene zikugwilizana ndi malamulo a united states internal revenue service
english: 52," if a cash or similar transaction is unavoidable, you must take care to comply with the detailed and complex reporting obligations associated with such transactions, including obligations imposed by the united states internal revenue service"

chichewa: 53,"mukuyenera kuwonetsetsa kuti makasitomala wonse, ma sapulaya, ndi ena wonse amene mumachita nawo bizinesi ali wololera kusunga zonse zoyenera ndikupereka malipoti"
english: 53,"you must to the extent possible be sure all customers, suppliers, and others with whom you have a business relationship are willing to comply in full with all record keeping duties and are willing to accurately report all aspects of a transaction"
54,know and live the standards

chichewa: 55, podziwa ndikumvetsetsa ndikulondola malamulo a kampaniwa ndi zimene zingatipangitse kukhala a chitsanzo
english: 55," by knowing, understanding, and following applicable laws and company policies, as well as our core values, each of us can serve as a role model"
56,know the law and ask tough questions

chichewa: 57, mukuyenera kudziwa malamulo amene akukhudzana ndi ntchito ndi udindo wanu
english: 57, you are expected to be familiar with the laws that apply to your specific job function and level of responsibility

chichewa: 58," ngati simukudziwa lamulo la kampani, ngati lilipo, funsani a cco kapena ccm a kampani yanu"
english: 58," if you are not sure whether a law or company policy applies, or whether it exists at all, ask the company’s chief legal officer or ccd"
59,don’t make assumptions

chichewa: 60, musaganize kuti akulu akulu akudziwa kapena sakusamala za chinthu china choncho muyenera kufunsa kuti mudziwe
english: 60, do not assume that management already knows or doesn’t care about an issue or situation

chichewa: 61," komanso, musaganize kuti china chake sichikonzedwa"
english: 61," also, do not assume that no action will be taken"

chichewa: 62, akulu akulu a aoi ndi wodzipereka kuwonetsetsa kuti za malamulo zimene zikuyenera kuchitika zikutsatidwa
english: 62, aoi management is dedicated to ensuring that the standards of legal and ethical behavior are upheld
63, we want you to tell us if something is wrong
64,"don’t ignore violations, report them"

chichewa: 65, tikuyenera kuyika pa mtima malamulo akampani
english: 65, we all need to take the law and company policies seriously

chichewa: 66," ngati mukuwona kuti wina akuphwanya malamulowa, tsatirani njira zoyenera kuti muzikonze"
english: 66," if you think someone may be violating a law or policy, please take steps to address the situation

chichewa: 67," nenani kwa ccd a kampani kapena kwa manijala wowona za compliance wa mu dera lanu, wowona za audit mu bodi ya ma dayilekitala kapena yimbani foni panambala ya ulere (mobisa ngati simukufuna kudziwika)"
english: 67, report it to management, the ccd, your local compliance manager, the audit committee of the board of directors, or the compliance helpline (anonymously if you wish)"
68, don’t be pressured

chichewa: 69," sikololedwa kuphwanya lamulo, kapena kukakamizidwa kuti mutero – ngakhale kuphwanya lamulo kungathandize kuti mukwaniritse zolinga zanu"
english: 69," it is never acceptable to violate a law or policy, nor should you ever feel encouraged or pressured to do so – even if you think the violation will improve the bottom line or help to meet a performance goal"

chichewa: 0,"tiyi ndi imodzi mwa mbewu zothandiza ku mwera ndi kum'mawa kwa afilika, ndipo imathandiza alimi ambiri kupeza ndalama"
english: 0,"tea is one of the most important agricultural crops in east and southern africa, and is a source of income for countless smallholder farmers"

chichewa: 1," koma ngati alimi satsatira ndondomeko yoyenerera pa ulimi wa mbewuyi, chilengedwe, madzi ndi nthaka zimawonongeka, komanso ogwira ntchito pa mundapo amavutika"
english: 1," however, if unsustainable practices are allowed to continue, they will contaminate the environment, exhaust the water or soil, and exploit the workers"

chichewa: 2, choncho ulimi wa tiyi umenewo si umapitiliranso
english: 2," such way, tea production cannot be sustained in the long run"

chichewa: 3,kugwiritsa ntchito mankhwala si njira yokhayo yotetezela mbewu ku tizilombo ndi matenda
english: 3,use of pesticide is not the only way to control pests and diseases

chichewa: 4," ngati tiyi akusamalidwa bwino mu afilika, atha kupilira ku tizilombo popanda kuthira mankhwala"
english: 4," when tea bushes are maintained strong and healthy in africa, they should be able to outgrow short-term pest infestations, without applying chemicals"

chichewa: 5, kupopera mankhwala kukhoza kuwononga chitetezo cha mbewu ndikupangitsa kuti matenda ayambe
english: 5, spraying would kill the natural enemies of pests and could allow epidemics to develop

chichewa: 6," mu gawo limeneli, tiphunziramo za m'mene tingapewere matenda ndi tizilombo"
english: 6," in this section, we learn about how to manage pests and diseases in a sustainable way"

chichewa: 7,"ngati mwabzala phata latsopano la tiyi, musankhe mbewu za tiyi zomwe zimapilira ku matenda ndi tizilombo tomwe timaononga tiyi"
english: 7,"when you plant a new tea bush, choose clones that are resistant to pests and diseases, such as mites and helopeltis"

chichewa: 8, ndibwino kubzala mbewu zambiri za tiyi osakhala imodzi yokha
english: 8," it is better to plant several clones, instead of just one clone"

chichewa: 9," ngati mwabzala mbewu za tiyi zosiyana, muzibzale mtundu uliwonse padera kuti musavutike pozisamalira"
english: 9," when planting several clones, plant them in blocks of pure stands for easier management"

chichewa: 10,"ngati mundawo unagwidapo ndi matenda owononga mizu, matendawa atha kukhala kuti atsalira mu mitengo imene idakali m'mundamo"
english: 10,"if the field had been previously infested by a root disease, such as armillaria, the disease can still be hosted in the roots of remaining trees"

chichewa: 11," choncho, ndikoyenera kuti matendawa athetsedwe pogwiritsa ntchito njira yosadzula mitengo"
english: 11," therefore, they need to be eliminated through a method called “ring barking” which is removal of the back around the tree to kill the pathogen in the roots"

chichewa: 12, iyi ndi njira imene mumasadzula makungwa a mtengo
english: 12,"mulching and maintaining a good canopy prevent the light from reaching the ground, hence controlling the weed growth"

chichewa: 13,kuphimba tiyi komanso kuonetsetsa kuti phata la tiyi liri pa mlingo wabwino zimathandizila kuti dzuwa lisaombe pa nthaka
english: 13, weeding with a hoe could damage the roots of the tea bushes

chichewa: 14, izi zimathandizira kuti zomera zosafunikira zisamele
english: 14, it is better to pull out weeds by hand

chichewa: 15, ndibwino kupalira ndi manja chifukwa kupalira ndi khasu kumathanso kuwononga mizu ya tiyi
english: 15,moles and rats that damage the roots of tea bushes
16," their damage can be prevented by digging trenches, and by planting molerepellent plants, such as tephrosia vogelli and tagetes minuta (mexican marigold), onion and garlic"

chichewa: 17, mbewa zikhoza kupewedwa pokumba mayenje komanso pobzala mbewu zina zimene zimathamangitsa tizilombo
english: 17, avoid killing them

chichewa: 18," mbewu zimenezi ndi monga mthuthu (tephrosia vogelli- mtundu wa chomera umene umagwiritsidwa ntchito yopangila mankhwala a m'munda), tagetes minuta (mtundu wa chomera umene uli mgulu la mpendadzuwa), anyezi ndi adyo"
english: 18,"if you see sunken lesions of woody tissue on stems and branches, these are signs of phomopsis infestation"

chichewa: 19,"ngati mukuwona kuti mitengo ili ndi ti zilonda pa tsinde ndi nthambi, dziwani kuti izi ndi zizindikiro za matenda owoletsa mitengo"
english: 19, phomopsis is a fungal disease that enters through open wounds on stems and branches

chichewa: 20, awa ndi matenda amene amagwira mtengo kudzela mu tizilonda timene timadza chifukwa chakuti mtengo wakhapidwa
english: 20, the wounds could have been caused by a hoe during manual weeding or by moles and rats

chichewa: 21, mtengo utha kukhapidwa pamene mukupalira ndi khasu komanso tizilombo ndi makoswe zitha kubowola mtengo
english: 21,"to control helopeltis infestation, it is recommended to pluck all the young soft leaves and leave only the hard leaves in the field"

chichewa: 22,"kuti muthane ndi udzudzu wa tiyi, mukuyenera kutchola masamba anthete a tiyi ndikusiya masamba okhwima"
english: 22, this method is called “hard plucking”

chichewa: 23," potchola masamba onse anthete amene amadyedwa ndi udzudzu wa tiyi, zimathandiza kuti udzudzuwu usapitilire"
english: 23," by removing all the soft leaves that helopeltis can feed on, their population can be controlled"

chichewa: 24," kuti mupewe matenda a udzudzu wa tiyi, ndibwino kubzala mitundu ya mbewu ya tiyi imene imapilira ku udzudzu wa tiyi"
english: 24,ladybirds are aphids’ natural enemies

chichewa: 25,mbalame zina zimadya tizilombo ndikuchepetsa chiwerengero chatizilomboti
english: 25, ladybirds feed on aphids and control their population

chichewa: 26, mukapopela mankhwala tizilombo pamodzi ndi mbalame zomwe zimafa
english: 26, spraying insecticide would kill not only aphids but also ladybirds

chichewa: 27," posapopela mankhwala, mumateteza mbalamezi zimene zimathandiza pochepetsa tizilombo"
english: 27," by not spraying insecticide, you can protect ladybirds and maintain the natural control of aphids"

chichewa: 28,"mukatha kupopera mankhwala, muyenera kutsuka zipangizo zothiririra mankhwala ndi zozitetezera"
english: 28,"after spraying chemicals, you need to wash your application equipment and personal protective clothing (ppe)"

chichewa: 29," madzi otsukira amatsalira mankhwala, ndiye ngati simusamala, akhoza kuononga chilengedwe"
english: 29," water used to wash these equipment contains chemicals, so if you do not manage it properly, it would contaminate the environment"

chichewa: 30,"mukapopera mankhwala m'madimba a masamba, tsukani zida ndikuthira madzi m'dimba momwemo"
english: 30,"when you spray vegetable fields, wash the equipment and pour the washing water back to the field"

chichewa: 31,"mukapopera mankhwala zifuyo, tsukani zida ndikutaya madzi mdzala/mdzenje"
english: 31,"when you spray animals, wash the equipment and pour the washing water into a soak pit"

chichewa: 32, mdzenje muyenera kudzadza makala omwe amathandiza kuyeretsa madzi
english: 32," a soak pit should be filled with charcoal, which helps to purify the water"

chichewa: 33, osadula mitengo yachilengedwe kuti mupange makala
english: 33, do not cut down indigenous trees to make charcoal
34, remember also to wash the protective clothing

chichewa: 35, madzi ochapira atayidwe monga tafotokozera pamwambapa
english: 35, treat the washing water in the same way as described above

chichewa: 36,"ngati madzi okutha ntchito ali ochepa, akhoza kutayidwa mungalande yokumbidwa kumbuyo kwa dimba"
english: 36,"domestic waste water, when its quantity is small, can be disposed by pouring into a canal dug in the backyard garden"

chichewa: 37, ngalande idzalidwe ndi nthochi ndi mizu yomwe imamwa madzi ambiri
english: 37," the canal should be planted with bananas and arrow roots, both of which absorb water very well"

chichewa: 38,"mitengo ya bulugama imapereka nkhuni, koma ikabzalidwa pamalo ponyowa, mtsinje kapena chitsime, imamwa madzi ambiri mpaka kuumitsa madzi"
english: 38,"eucalyptus trees are good source of fuel, but when they are planted near a wetland, river, stream or well, they absorb so much water that they can exhaust the water source"

chichewa: 39," ngati mtsinje kapena chitsime ziuma, zingathe kukhudza miyoyo ya apabanja panu ndi anthu amudera mwanu"
english: 39," if a stream or well gets dried up, it would cause significant negative impacts on the lives of your family and people in your community"
40, we need to protect the water sources

chichewa: 41,"madzi ndi moyo, choncho timafuna madzi okwanira pa miyoyo yathu"
english: 41,"water is essential for our lives, and we need to secure sufficient supply of water for our living"

chichewa: 42, njira ina yopezera madzi yosavuta ndi kukolola madzi a mvula
english: 42, harvesting rain water is an economic and efficient way to obtain water

chichewa: 43, mungakolole madzi a mvula amene amagwa pa denga nkuwasunga mu thanki
english: 43," you can collect the rain water that falls on the roof, and keep it in a tank"

chichewa: 44, mukhoza kuwagwiritsa ntchito madzi amenewa mnyumba mwanu pokumwa koma mutawawiritsa kaye
